# Obsidian Snippets Surface

This directory is intentionally represented by Markdown only in this batch because the current session allows Markdown mutations only. Project-safe CSS snippets may be added later if an operator explicitly requests shared visual styling.

## Evidence

| Claim | Source | Type | Notes |
|-------|--------|------|-------|
| Shared `.obsidian/snippets/` is a project-safe shared vault surface, while volatile workspace state is out of scope. | `kb/raw/sources/nerdbot-skill-contract.md` | raw source note | Derived from Nerdbot vault guidance. |
